message:
fix: capture ctx.Err() before cancel() to prevent timeout detection race (gt-olvcx)

In run_migration.go, cancel() was called immediately after CombinedOutput()
returns, then ctx.Err() was checked later to distinguish timeout from other
failures. This creates a race: calling cancel() could modify the context
state before the check. Fix by capturing ctx.Err() before calling cancel().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
